parsed.rationale: Waypoint C is located near the center of a hill, indicated by the 7400-foot contour line. Waypoint B is located in a lower elevation area, indicated by the 7000-foot contour line. Moving from C to B involves crossing several closely spaced contour lines (7400, 7200, 7000) in a short distance, which signifies a steep initial slope. As the path approaches waypoint B, the contour lines become more widely spaced, indicating that the slope is becoming gentler.
